title: gaultheria costaricensis
intro: Gaultheria costaricensis, also known as Cost Rican Gaultheria, is a shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and has been used to treat conditions such as arthritis and wounds. Gaultheria costaricensis can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
